title: Create Weight Goal
description: Creates or updates a user's weight goal.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Weight goal start date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: startWeight
parameters.description: Starting weight before reaching goal in the format X.XX; entered in the unit system corresponding to the Accept-Language header provided.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Target weight goal in the format X.XX; entered in the unit system corresponding to the Accept-Language header provided. Required if the user doesn't have an existing weight goal.

response_fields.name: goal : goalType
response_fields.description: The goal type. Supported: LOSE | GAIN | MAINTAIN

response_fields.name: goal : startWeight
response_fields.description: User's weight when goal was established.

response_fields.name: goal : weightThreshold
response_fields.description: The recommended amount of weight to lose each week to achieve and maintain goal.
